details.message: reports/board/ directory is missing. Expected top-level subdirectory under reports/.
reports/board/ directory is missing — governance contract requires reports/audit/ and reports/board/ to exist.

Moltbot code found in active code paths (not just docs/reports documenting removal). Directory moltbot/ contains live Python modules: board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py, agents/. Scripts referencing moltbot: scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py.
